SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

Class RulePolicy

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules.RulePolicy
public class RulePolicy extends Object
Complete loaded YAML rule policy: metadata, severity mapping, grade mapping, and category definitions with pre-parsed expressions.

    A grade mapping entry from the YAML policy.

  • Method Details

    • getVersion

      public String getVersion()

    • getSeverityMappings

      public List<RulePolicy.SeverityMapping> getSeverityMappings()

    • getGradeMappings

      public List<RulePolicy.GradeMapping> getGradeMappings()

    • getCategories

      public List<CategoryDefinition> getCategories()

    • getSourceFile

      public String getSourceFile()
      Source filename or resource name from which this policy was loaded, or null if unknown.

    • severityForScore

      public String severityForScore(double score)
      Determine the severity string for a given rule score (0.0-1.0). Severity mappings are ordered from highest minScore to lowest; the first match is returned.

    • floorForScore

      public int floorForScore(double score)
      Determine the score floor for a given rule score (0.0-1.0). Returns the floor from the highest applicable severity mapping.

    • gradeForScore

      public IRiskScore.LetterGrade gradeForScore(int score)
      Determine the letter grade for a given score.

    • riskLevelForGrade

      public IRiskScore.RiskLevel riskLevelForGrade(IRiskScore.LetterGrade grade)
      Determine the risk level for a given letter grade.

    • mergeUserRules

      public RulePolicy mergeUserRules(RulePolicy userRules)
      Merge user-defined rules into this (system) policy, returning a new combined policy. For each user category: if it matches a system category key, user rules are appended to that category's rule list; otherwise a new category is created. Does not modify this policy instance.
      Parameters:
      userRules - policy containing user-defined categories with USR- prefixed rules
      Returns:
      new merged RulePolicy
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if duplicate rule IDs are found within a category
